statement: In every magma, Equation 908 (`x = y * ((y * x) * (x * z))`) implies Equation 1688 (`x = (y * x) * ((x * z) * y)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0762
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op y (op (op y x) (op x z)))) :
    ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op y x) (op (op x z) y))
